'''Kare Fontin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Kare Fontin served as a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the reign of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Fontin was over 100 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, and operated as a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]]. Although his body was frail and his hearing impaired, Fontin's mind and wit were intact. He once traveled under escort from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Beta Olikark]].
